title: VideoAnalyticsDetection
description: Schema for messages published by the video-analytics app to the AIO MQTT broker (topic: video-analytics/detections).

deviceId.description: Identifier of the edge device that produced the detection.

version.description: APP_VERSION baked into the container image (semver).

detections.description: List of objects detected in the frame.

label.description: Detected class label (e.g. person, vehicle, package).

bbox.description: Bounding box [x, y, width, height] in pixels.
